syntax_15175.creator: 3add
syntax_15175.title: General - On Packet
syntax_15175.description: Listen to incoming/outgoing packets, more on [the wiki](https://github.com/3add/PacketEventsSK/wiki/Events)
syntax_15175.compatible_addon_version: 1.0.0 1.0.1 altered 1.1.0 (changed from struct to event) 1.1.1 (added packet priority, added listening to all packets and fixed bugs)

en: Listen to incoming/outgoing packets, more on [the wiki](https://github.com/3add/PacketEventsSK/wiki/Events)

syntax_15176.creator: 3add
syntax_15176.title: General - Cancel Packet
syntax_15176.description:
Used to cancel the packet in a packet receive/send event.
This just means that the packet won't be processed/sent.

en:
Used to cancel the packet in a packet receive/send event.
This just means that the packet won't be processed/sent.

syntax_15177.creator: 3add
syntax_15177.title: Fake Entity - Kill Fake Entity
syntax_15177.description: Used to kill a spawned fake entity

en: Used to kill a spawned fake entity

syntax_15178.creator: 3add
syntax_15178.title: General - Fetch Skin
syntax_15178.description:
Used to fetch a player skin.
**This is processed on an async thread and thus will pause your code until it's been loaded.**
syntax_15178.syntax_pattern:
fetch skin (from|of) player (named|with name) %string% and store (it|the result) in %-~objects%
set %-~objects% to [fetch] skin (from|of) player (named|with name) %string%

en:
Used to fetch a player skin.
**This is processed on an async thread and thus will pause your code until it's been loaded.**

syntax_15179.creator: 3add
syntax_15179.title: Fake Entity - Spawn Fake Entity
syntax_15179.description: Spawn a fake entity at a location, it can only be spawned once. To move use teleport.

en: Spawn a fake entity at a location, it can only be spawned once. To move use teleport.

syntax_15180.creator: 3add
syntax_15180.title: Fake Entity - Teleport Fake Entity
syntax_15180.description: Teleport a spawned fake entity to a location.

en: Teleport a spawned fake entity to a location.

syntax_15181.creator: 3add
syntax_15181.title: General - Send/Receive Packet
syntax_15181.description: Used to force the server to send or receive a packet, optionally silently. (silent means it won't trigger on packet send or receive)

en: Used to force the server to send or receive a packet, optionally silently. (silent means it won't trigger on packet send or receive)

syntax_15182.creator: 3add
syntax_15182.title: Fake Entity - Ride
syntax_15182.description:
Make fake entities ride another entity (fake or real), or remove them as passengers.
**Note: Real entities are just a single packet being sent, when a player relogs, changes worlds or some other circumstances the passengers will be altered by the vanilla server.**

en:
Make fake entities ride another entity (fake or real), or remove them as passengers.
**Note: Real entities are just a single packet being sent, when a player relogs, changes worlds or some other circumstances the passengers will be altered by the vanilla server.**

syntax_15183.creator: 3add
syntax_15183.title: Simple Glow - Entity Glow State
syntax_15183.description:
Set the glow state of an entity for a set of viewers.
Internally everything is handled by the addon. (fully packet based)

en:
Set the glow state of an entity for a set of viewers.
Internally everything is handled by the addon. (fully packet based)

syntax_15184.creator: 3add
syntax_15184.title: Simple Skin - Player Displayed Skin
syntax_15184.description:
Set the displayed skin of a player for a set of viewers.
Internally everything is handled by the addon (fully packet based).

en:
Set the displayed skin of a player for a set of viewers.
Internally everything is handled by the addon (fully packet based).

syntax_15185.creator: 3add
syntax_15185.title: Fake Entity - All Fake Entities
syntax_15185.description: Used to get a list of all fake entities that are viewable by least a single player

en: Used to get a list of all fake entities that are viewable by least a single player

syntax_15186.creator: 3add
syntax_15186.title: Fake Entity Event Value
syntax_15186.description: The fake entity involved in the event. (Only available in fake entity related events)

en: The fake entity involved in the event. (Only available in fake entity related events)

syntax_15187.creator: 3add
syntax_15187.title: Fake Entity - Visible Fake Entities
syntax_15187.description: Used to get all fake entities viewed by a player

en: Used to get all fake entities viewed by a player

syntax_15188.creator: 3add
syntax_15188.title: General - Packet Type
syntax_15188.description: The packet type of a packet

en: The packet type of a packet

syntax_15189.creator: 3add
syntax_15189.title: Fake Entity - From Entity UUID
syntax_15189.description: Retrieve a fake entity from it's entity uuid, this only works for spawned fake entities

en: Retrieve a fake entity from it's entity uuid, this only works for spawned fake entities

syntax_15191.creator: 3add
syntax_15191.title: General - Player Skin of Player
syntax_15191.description:
Gets the skin the player had when they joined the server
NOTE: This only works on servers in online mode

en:
Gets the skin the player had when they joined the server
NOTE: This only works on servers in online mode

syntax_15192.creator: 3add
syntax_15192.title: Simple Glow - Glow Entity Viewers
syntax_15192.description: The players that are able to see the entity as glowing.

en: The players that are able to see the entity as glowing.

syntax_15193.creator: 3add
syntax_15193.title: Fake Entity - From Entity ID
syntax_15193.description: Retrieve a fake entity from it's entity id, this only works for spawned fake entities

en: Retrieve a fake entity from it's entity id, this only works for spawned fake entities

syntax_15194.creator: 3add
syntax_15194.title: General - Create Meta
syntax_15194.description:
Create a new meta from an entity type.

### Available Metas and their fields
* **entity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `on fire state (on fire)`
  - `sneaking state (sneaking)`
  - `sprinting state (sprinting)`
  - `swimming state (swimming)`
  - `invisible state (invisible)`
  - `glowing state (glowing)`
  - `elytra flying state (elytra flying)`
  - `custom name`
  - `custom name visible state (custom name visible)`
  - `silent state (silent)`
  - `gravity state (gravity)`
  - `frozen time (frozen ticks)`

* **livingentity** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `health (hp)`

* **item** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `item`

* **interaction** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `interaction width`
  - `interaction height`
  - `interaction responsive state (interaction responsive)`

* **display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `display interpolation delay`
  - `display transform interpolation duration`
  - `display teleport interpolation duration`
  - `display translation`
  - `display scale`
  - `display left rotation`
  - `display right rotation`
  - `display billboard constraints (display billboard)`
  - `display brightness override (display brightness)`
  - `display view range`
  - `display shadow radius`
  - `display shadow strength`
  - `display width`
  - `display height`
  - `display glow color override (display glow color)`

* **block display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display block data (display block state)`

* **item display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display item (display item stack)`
  - `display item transform`

* **text display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display text (display content)`
  - `display line width`
  - `display background color`
  - `display text shadowed state (display shadowed state, display shadowed)`
  - `display see through state (display see through)`
  - `display use default background state (display use default background)`
  - `display text alignment (display alignment)`

en:
Create a new meta from an entity type.

### Available Metas and their fields
* **entity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `on fire state (on fire)`
  - `sneaking state (sneaking)`
  - `sprinting state (sprinting)`
  - `swimming state (swimming)`
  - `invisible state (invisible)`
  - `glowing state (glowing)`
  - `elytra flying state (elytra flying)`
  - `custom name`
  - `custom name visible state (custom name visible)`
  - `silent state (silent)`
  - `gravity state (gravity)`
  - `frozen time (frozen ticks)`

* **livingentity** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `health (hp)`

* **item** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `item`

* **interaction** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `interaction width`
  - `interaction height`
  - `interaction responsive state (interaction responsive)`

* **display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `display interpolation delay`
  - `display transform interpolation duration`
  - `display teleport interpolation duration`
  - `display translation`
  - `display scale`
  - `display left rotation`
  - `display right rotation`
  - `display billboard constraints (display billboard)`
  - `display brightness override (display brightness)`
  - `display view range`
  - `display shadow radius`
  - `display shadow strength`
  - `display width`
  - `display height`
  - `display glow color override (display glow color)`

* **block display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display block data (display block state)`

* **item display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display item (display item stack)`
  - `display item transform`

* **text display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display text (display content)`
  - `display line width`
  - `display background color`
  - `display text shadowed state (display shadowed state, display shadowed)`
  - `display see through state (display see through)`
  - `display use default background state (display use default background)`
  - `display text alignment (display alignment)`

syntax_15190.creator: 3add
syntax_15190.title: Fake Entity - Create Fake Entity
syntax_15190.description:
Create a new fake entity from an entity type.

### Available Entities and their fields
* **entity** fields:
  - `entity viewers (viewers)`
  - `entity location (location)`
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `entity meta data (meta data, meta)`
  - `entity type (type)`
  - `entity uuid (uuid)`

* **player** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `player skin (skin)`
  - `player username (player name, username, name)`

en:
Create a new fake entity from an entity type.

### Available Entities and their fields
* **entity** fields:
  - `entity viewers (viewers)`
  - `entity location (location)`
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `entity meta data (meta data, meta)`
  - `entity type (type)`
  - `entity uuid (uuid)`

* **player** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `player skin (skin)`
  - `player username (player name, username, name)`

syntax_15208.creator: 3add
syntax_15208.title: Fake Entity - Fake Entity
syntax_15208.description: A fake entity viewable by at least 1 player

en: A fake entity viewable by at least 1 player

syntax_15196.creator: 3add
syntax_15196.title: General - Entity Id of Entity
syntax_15196.description: Gets the entity id of an entity on the server

en: Gets the entity id of an entity on the server

syntax_15197.creator: 3add
syntax_15197.title: Fake Living Entity Property - Attribute
syntax_15197.description: The attribute of a fake living entity.

en: The attribute of a fake living entity.

syntax_15198.creator: 3add
syntax_15198.title: General - Player Skin From Base64/Signature
syntax_15198.description:
Creates a skin object using a Base64 value and an optional cryptographic signature.
The value contains the texture URL, while the signature proves the skin is authentic from Mojang.

en:
Creates a skin object using a Base64 value and an optional cryptographic signature.
The value contains the texture URL, while the signature proves the skin is authentic from Mojang.

syntax_15202.creator: 3add
syntax_15202.title: General - Packet
syntax_15202.description: A packet sent by the client or server

en: A packet sent by the client or server

syntax_15204.creator: 3add
syntax_15204.title: General - Entity Meta
syntax_15204.description: The entity meta of a minecraft entity (this can both represent a fake entity's meta or a real entity's meta, but is mostly used for fake entities since the only use for real entities is for packet intercepting).

en: The entity meta of a minecraft entity (this can both represent a fake entity's meta or a real entity's meta, but is mostly used for fake entities since the only use for real entities is for packet intercepting).

syntax_15195.creator: 3add
syntax_15195.title: General - New Packet
syntax_15195.description:
Create a new packet from a packet type.

### Available Packets and their fields
* **entity velocity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `velocity vector (vector, velocity)`
* **interact entity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `interaction hand (hand)`
  - `location vector (location, loc)`
  - `sneaking state (sneaking)`
* **select bundle item** fields:
  - `slot id (id)`
  - `selected item index (selected index, item index, index)`
* **open sign editor** fields:
  - `block position (block pos, position, pos)`
  - `sign side (side)`
* **block change** fields:
  - `block position (block pos, position, pos)`
  - `block state (state, block data, data)`
* **destroy entities** fields:
  - `entity ids (ids)`
* **game test highlight pos** fields:
  - `absolute position (absolute pos, abs position, abs pos, position, pos)`
  - `relative position (relative pos, rel position, rel pos)`
* **entity metadata** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `entity metadata (entity meta, metadata, meta)`

en:
Create a new packet from a packet type.

### Available Packets and their fields
* **entity velocity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `velocity vector (vector, velocity)`
* **interact entity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `interaction hand (hand)`
  - `location vector (location, loc)`
  - `sneaking state (sneaking)`
* **select bundle item** fields:
  - `slot id (id)`
  - `selected item index (selected index, item index, index)`
* **open sign editor** fields:
  - `block position (block pos, position, pos)`
  - `sign side (side)`
* **block change** fields:
  - `block position (block pos, position, pos)`
  - `block state (state, block data, data)`
* **destroy entities** fields:
  - `entity ids (ids)`
* **game test highlight pos** fields:
  - `absolute position (absolute pos, abs position, abs pos, position, pos)`
  - `relative position (relative pos, rel position, rel pos)`
* **entity metadata** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `entity metadata (entity meta, metadata, meta)`

syntax_15201.creator: 3add
syntax_15201.title: Entity Meta Property Field
syntax_15201.description:
Gets or sets a metadata property field value from an entity meta instance by its name.
Note that some entities inherit properties (for example all entities inherit "entity" fields

### Available Meta Fields by Category
* **entity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `on fire state (on fire)`
  - `sneaking state (sneaking)`
  - `sprinting state (sprinting)`
  - `swimming state (swimming)`
  - `invisible state (invisible)`
  - `glowing state (glowing)`
  - `elytra flying state (elytra flying)`
  - `custom name`
  - `custom name visible state (custom name visible)`
  - `silent state (silent)`
  - `gravity state (gravity)`
  - `frozen time (frozen ticks)`

* **livingentity** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `health (hp)`

* **item** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `item`

* **interaction** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `interaction width`
  - `interaction height`
  - `interaction responsive state (interaction responsive)`

* **display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `display interpolation delay`
  - `display transform interpolation duration`
  - `display teleport interpolation duration`
  - `display translation`
  - `display scale`
  - `display left rotation`
  - `display right rotation`
  - `display billboard constraints (display billboard)`
  - `display brightness override (display brightness)`
  - `display view range`
  - `display shadow radius`
  - `display shadow strength`
  - `display width`
  - `display height`
  - `display glow color override (display glow color)`

* **block display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display block data (display block state)`

* **item display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display item (display item stack)`
  - `display item transform`

* **text display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display text (display content)`
  - `display line width`
  - `display background color`
  - `display text shadowed state (display shadowed state, display shadowed)`
  - `display see through state (display see through)`
  - `display use default background state (display use default background)`
  - `display text alignment (display alignment)`

en:
Gets or sets a metadata property field value from an entity meta instance by its name.
Note that some entities inherit properties (for example all entities inherit "entity" fields

### Available Meta Fields by Category
* **entity** fields:
  - `entity id (id)`
  - `on fire state (on fire)`
  - `sneaking state (sneaking)`
  - `sprinting state (sprinting)`
  - `swimming state (swimming)`
  - `invisible state (invisible)`
  - `glowing state (glowing)`

  - `custom name`
  - `custom name visible state (custom name visible)`
  - `silent state (silent)`
  - `gravity state (gravity)`
  - `frozen time (frozen ticks)`

* **livingentity** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `health (hp)`

* **item** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `item`

* **interaction** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `interaction width`
  - `interaction height`
  - `interaction responsive state (interaction responsive)`

* **display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **entity**)*
  - `display interpolation delay`
  - `display transform interpolation duration`
  - `display teleport interpolation duration`
  - `display translation`
  - `display scale`
  - `display left rotation`
  - `display right rotation`
  - `display billboard constraints (display billboard)`

  - `display view range`

  - `display glow color override (display glow color)`

* **block display** fields:

  - `display block data (display block state)`

* **item display** fields:
  - *(Inherits all fields from **display**)*
  - `display item (display item stack)`
  - `display item transform`

* **text display** fields:

  - `display text shadowed state (display shadowed state, display shadowed)`

syntax_15205.creator: 3add
